rules.name: Sender identity → single country
rules.description: A sender_identity_no must always map to exactly one sender_country across all transactions.

rules.name: Sender identity → single name
rules.description: A sender_identity_no must always map to exactly one sender_name (no alias drift).

rules.name: Receiver identity → single country
rules.description: A receiver_identity_no must always map to exactly one receiver_country.

rules.name: Receiver identity → single name
rules.description: A receiver_identity_no must always map to exactly one receiver_name.

rules.name: Customer → stable branch
rules.description: An internal customer_no must always use the same branch for that party role (sender/receiver).

rules.name: EUR amount conversion
rules.description: amount_eur must be within 1% of the FX-converted amount for the stated currency.

rules.name: Required party fields
rules.description: Every transaction must have sender_name, sender_identity_no, receiver_name, and receiver_identity_no populated.

rules.name: External sender without customer no
rules.description: When sender_customer_no is null, sender_name and sender_identity_no must still be present (inbound wire rule).
